rationale: 'Algebraic geometry (toric geometry)' is a genuinely different specific field from the reference's 'computer science (symbolic computation)', so field_match fails. The stated mechanism is Ehrhart lattice-point counting of polytope dilates equated with the Hilbert polynomial for an ample line bundle on a toric variety, whereas the reference mechanism is an obstruction/certificate argument using unsolvability of a parameterized linear difference (telescoping) equation to certify algebraic independence — these are distinct machinery, so mechanism_match fails and the answer is not equivalent.
